torch_pattern:
x = x - 0.99000000953674316
x = torch.lt(x, 0)
x = x.to(torch.bfloat16)
applicability_notes: Chain fusion including scalar-broadcast subtract, zero-comparison, and dtype cast; bit-exact vs unfused single-op sequence (torch.equal assertion in test). TYPECAST inside chain takes (src_dtype.value, dst_dtype.value) params.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.unary_chain(x_tt, [ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.SUB_UNARY_SFPU, 0.99000000953674316), ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.LTZ), ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.TYPECAST, ttnn.DataType.FLOAT32.value, ttnn.DataType.BFLOAT16.value)])

placement_observations.source: unit_test: default interleaved placement, no explicit memory_config at call site
